headlines.title: U.S. launches dozens of strikes against Iran, citing attacks on commercial ships
headlines.summary: The latest violence followed accusations by Qatar that Iran attacked a tanker ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Foreign media were granted rare visas to cover Khamenei’s funeral. Here’s what our reporter saw.
headlines.summary: A regime that has survived months of attack by the United States and Israel is projecting a show of strength with enormous crowds and the reappearance of military leaders.

headlines.title: Trump’s NATO-bashing casts shadow over U.S. pledge to defend allies
headlines.summary: NATO’s Article 5 has long promised that an attack against one is an attack against all. President Donald Trump is not so sure.

headlines.title: U.S. gave Tehran details on Iranian asylum seekers, lawsuit alleges
headlines.summary: The claim, outlined in court papers, contends information shared with Iran could jeopardize the lives of pro-democracy protesters, religious minorities and LGTBQ people.

headlines.title: Haitians in U.S. fear mass deportations; Haiti fears mass return
headlines.summary: Mass deportations would cost the economy billions of dollars, analysts say, and mass arrivals would challenge a country already suffering record displacement.

headlines.title: Syria grapples with unrest as government faces old and new threats
headlines.summary: Damascus shaken by twin blasts during Macron's visit, marking heightened threats to Syria's fragile stability

headlines.title: 99% of people on Earth will get sunlight at the same time this Wednesday
headlines.summary: On July 8, at about 11:10 GMT, about 99 percent of the world experiences sunlight at the same time.

headlines.title: Oil prices surge as US strikes Iran, reversing slide to pre-war levels
headlines.summary: Brent crude rises above $76 a barrel for the first time in two weeks amid renewed violence in Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: US immigration officer shoots and kills man in Texas
headlines.summary: Man, identified as Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, is latest to be killed by ICE officers since President Trump took power.

headlines.title: How the US-Iran conflict is reshaping Africa’s geopolitical opportunities
headlines.summary: The US-Israel war on Iran is forcing African governments to rethink their security and economic priorities.

headlines.title: Reigning champion Argentina escapes with remarkable World Cup victory over Egypt
headlines.summary: Egypt was leading late, up 2-0. The Argentinians looked beaten. But they fought and fought and fought. Scoring one goal, then another to equalize. And, finally, a third to advance to the quarterfinal.

headlines.title: International Olympic Committee lifts Russia suspension ahead of 2028 LA Games
headlines.summary: The International Olympic Committee advised sports bodies to end a three-year program vetting Russians for neutral status ahead of qualifying events for the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics.

headlines.title: New lawsuit alleges U.S. shared asylum application details with Iran
headlines.summary: A lawsuit alleges the Trump administration is divulging details of Iranian asylum seekers to the government of Iran.

headlines.title: There's no treatment designed for the Ebola strain ravaging DRC. But now there's hope
headlines.summary: The strain of the virus that's responsible for the current outbreak has no specific treatments or preventive measures. Three new clinical trials could provide possible breakthroughs.

headlines.title: Woman accuses Graham Platner of sexual assault. And, NATO summit begins
headlines.summary: Graham Platner is facing calls to end his bid for U.S. Senate in Maine after a woman accused him of sexual assault. And, Trump made his dissatisfaction with NATO clear ahead of its summit this week.

headlines.title: Opposition slams plan to oust Hungary's president
headlines.summary: Hungary's opposition party Fidesz has warned of "tyranny" in government after Prime Minister Peter Magyar submitted an amendment to remove President Tamas Sulyok, which could come into effect as early as next week.

headlines.title: Trump revives Greenland bid as tensions with allies resurface
headlines.summary: US President Donald Trump renewed his push for the United States to acquire Greenland on Tuesday, reviving a long-running dispute with European allies. He also criticized fellow NATO members over their response to recent US military actions in Iran.

headlines.title: Le Pen can run for president with an e-tag
headlines.summary: Former French presidential candidate Marine Le Pen's hopes of standing in next year's election are up in the air after a judge on Tuesday upheld her conviction for embezzlement of European Parliamentary funds.

headlines.title: NATO's push for higher defense budgets decried
headlines.summary: As Turkiye prepares to host the NATO summit on Tuesday and Wednesday, thousands of demonstrators took to the streets in Istanbul, Ankara and Izmir over the weekend to denounce the alliance's push for higher defense spending.

headlines.title: China's role in promoting global peace draws praise
headlines.summary: Pakistan's close coordination and communication with China during its efforts to ease tensions between Iran and the United States demonstrate the unique strategic partnership between the two countries and highlight Beijing's growing role in promoting peace, said Mushahid Hussain Syed, chairman of the Pakistan-China Institute.

headlines.title: Litigant in Supreme Court claims ‘silent compulsion’ in E20 petrol roll out
headlines.summary: A Supreme Court petition claims "silent compulsion" in E20 petrol rollout, demanding transparency on fuel composition and vehicle compatibility.

headlines.title: CPI(M) seeks withdrawal of proposed NFSA amendment
headlines.summary: CPI(M) opposes NFSA amendment, claiming it will harm smaller households and the poor by reducing foodgrain entitlements.

headlines.title: WhatsApp username debate centres on informational privacy
headlines.summary: The WhatsApp username debate highlights the tension between user privacy, technology design, and state intervention amid cybercrime concerns.

headlines.title: Staff stole cash, security protocols not enforced: Ram Temple SIT report
headlines.summary: SIT report reveals theft during Ram Temple donation counting, highlighting ignored security protocols and involvement of multiple staff members.

headlines.title: Baruipur rape-murder case: One key accused killed in encounter
headlines.summary: Key suspect in Baruipur rape-murder case killed in police encounter as investigation progresses and capital punishment promised.

headlines.title: Iran targets sites in Bahrain, Kuwait after wave of US strikes
headlines.summary: Reuters: Iran targets sites in Bahrain, Kuwait after wave of US strikes.

headlines.title: Oregon to ask court to delay Paramount deal for 60 days while it reviews records
headlines.summary: Reuters: Oregon to ask court to delay Paramount deal for 60 days while it reviews records.

headlines.title: US military launches strikes against Iran, Central Command says
headlines.summary: Reuters: US military launches strikes against Iran, Central Command says.

headlines.title: Gold wavers as investors weigh US strikes on Iran, await Fed minutes
headlines.summary: Reuters: Gold wavers as investors weigh US strikes on Iran, await Fed minutes.

headlines.title: ICE agent fatally shoots motorist in Houston vehicle stop, agency says
headlines.summary: Reuters: ICE agent fatally shoots motorist in Houston vehicle stop, agency says.

summarySections.title: News and markets
sentences: Global headlines: U.S. launches dozens of strikes against Iran, citing attacks on commercial ships (The latest violence followed accusations by Qatar that Iran attacked a tanker ship in the Strait of Hormuz); Foreign media were granted rare visas to cover Khamenei’s funeral. Here’s what our reporter saw. (A regime that has survived months of attack by the United States and Israel is projecting a show of strength with enormous crowds and the reappearance of military leaders); and Trump’s NATO-bashing casts shadow over U.S. pledge to defend allies (NATO’s Article 5 has long promised that an attack against one is an attack against all. President Donald Trump is not so sure).
Markets leaned lower, with 6 of 7 tracked indexes down; HANG SENG INDEX up 2.29% was the largest move.
Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes.

summarySections.title: Hacker News and Product Hunt
sentences: Hacker News: How to Build a Minimal ZFS NAS Without Synology, QNAP, TrueNAS (neil.computer: How to Build a Minimal ZFS NAS Without Synology, QNAP, TrueNAS); Is The Economist Always Wrong? (economist.com: Is The Economist Always Wrong); and Tenda firmware (multiple versions) contains hidden authentication backdoor (kb.cert.org: Tenda firmware (multiple versions) contains hidden authentication backdoor).

Product Hunt features Kadoink AI (Gather people instantly by AI txt, video, or ringing phones), Glideo (Screen recordings that edit themselves), and Ogment AI (Your AI coworker, in Slack. Just tag @O).
